positive: A whimsical, stylized composition featuring a group of diverse forest woodland animals – including a smiling fox, a gentle deer, a hopping rabbit, and a watchful owl – interacting joyfully in a lush forest setting. The animals should have clean, stylized silhouettes with thick outlines, rendered in a limited, forest-inspired color palette (deep emerald green, sapphire blue, mustard yellow, and earthy browns). The style should be a blend of whimsical storybook illustration and modern flat vector art, giving a crisp, cheerful, and vibrant feel suitable for screen printing on apparel. The composition must be centralized and highly symmetrical, emphasizing negative space for clean printing. Studio-lit, high contrast, macro-details on foliage, perfect print resolution.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, disfigured, noisy, gradient, poor composition, realistic photo, photorealistic
